name: AIXTRON SE
window: Q1 FY26 print → intra-quarter · Apr 30 → Jun 19, 2026

events.text: Q1 FY26: revenue EUR 59m, -47% y/y (within the EUR 65m ±10m guide) on seasonality + weak power electronics; GM 18% (-12pp); EBIT EUR -22m. Signal in orders: intake EUR 171m, +~30% y/y, >2/3 optoelectronics — "clear inflection point" driven by Datacom lasers for AI data centers (copper→optical at 800G/1600G). Management raised FY26 guidance (mid-April) to revenue EUR 560m ±30m (was 520m), GM ~42%, EBIT margin 17-20%; Q2 guided EUR 110m ±10m. EUR 450m 5-year 0%-coupon convertible placed in April.
Read-across from Q1/26 tagged "positive in Optical and Power."

"AIXTRON: The Multi-Year OPTICAL Play" — Buy, PT raised to EUR 73. US optical model has transceiver units +~5x 2025-2028 against AIXA's ~100% InP MOCVD share; +8%/+16% above the FY28 consensus on revenue/EPS, with GM upside on tool volumes + a growing G10 mix; opto >2/3 of order intake.
"AIXTRON — A Multi-Year A.I. Capex Play?". Crux Capital (optics) lists Aixtron among the upstream optical-tool suppliers.

cells: Momentum building; datacom lasers for AI
One large G10-SiC China order completed
Underutilized; #1 in epi; util gradually up
FY cut to EUR 530-565m; '26 flat/slightly below
